message:
test(dep): update dep tree test for graceful missing-issue handling

The previous commit (3ef05f5) changed resolve_dep_tree_node_metadata
to return synthetic metadata instead of erroring when an internal
dependency target is missing.  Update the corresponding test:

- Rename from "errors_on_missing_internal_issue" to
  "missing_internal_issue" (no longer an error path)
- Call unwrap() instead of unwrap_err()
- Assert the returned tuple: title="[missing issue: bd-missing]",
  priority=2 (medium default), status="deleted"
- Update info!() log lines to match the new test name

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
